text: located on the intersection at magazine and washington is this great starbucks location being on the intersection there are plenty of parking options available through out your visit there the line is always people long no matter what time i go but they usually manage to go through it pretty quickly which is nice on my last visit i wanted to try the gingerbread latte and i had a free birthday drink so when i placed my order i requested both of those the woman who took my order okayed it and along i went i paid with a different guy who ended up charging me for the drink which was supposed to free i explained that i told the other woman it was meant to be the free birthday special but he just laughed and said you have to tell me not her well she s the one that took my order so she should ve been the one to put me through the register too so that was annoying they just had no communication between the staff members and how he shrugged it off was irritating anyways i got my gingerbread latte and took a seat now this place is always busy so don t expect your ideal seating if you come too late in the day i ended up moving three times as new more preferred places to sit became available the downside to the seating is that there aren t many powerpoint available and starbucks has to know that people come to work here while they drink their coffee not a clever move the gingerbread latte was just okay it didn t taste like gingerbread at all so i was pretty disappointed but i managed to finish it off despite the lack of taste there is a wide variety of seating inside with wall seating tabled seating and a few couch seating which is nice there is also outdoor seating but during this weather it isn t recommended but would give you views of the street which is a nice distraction from the hustle and bustle from inside overall a beautiful location but the lack of communication and consideration the staff have between themselves and the customers made the visit spoiled
out of green tea in the middle of the day when it s and sunny you re better than that starbucks on the plus side after waiting minutes the barista who brought it out was super friendly

i came for the wi fi as pjs coffee has lacking wifi power just a few shops down the road there was ample seating and my regular coffee was promptly handed to me creamer bar was well stocked clean floor and loud music like all the other homogonize starbucks you have ever been too

busy and central location makes this a coffee stop and social event this location is open longer than the close by peets or the other starbucks in the la cumbre mall across the street the staff always keeps a good pace and sets a high standard for the slower starbucks
drive thru is super convenient but can be slow especially during the weekday mornings seems understaffed at times but so far havent had an issue with an order

we stopped in for a iced tea on a very warm day customer service was good my tea was good as well the store felt very warm inside and we ended up going out and sitting in the car with air on to cool off

thank you doth such a place share such an idea with a complement reader seeks a very refined polite female acquaintance who may further an incomplete introduction to society though discreetly background

it s a starbucks you know what their coffee tastes like meh and what their prices are like high so i ll tell you why this became my starbucks they recently renovated the seating and it s a great study spot reliable wifi big tables in the middle a comfy couch in the corner and seating all alongside the window read convenient outlets and people watching huge improvement to the awkward tiny circular tables they had before it can get randomly crowded sometimes why any family would decide to bring all their children here for an afternoon or why a mom would bring teens to drink frappucinos is beyond me the barristas are nice one of them made fun of me for having been there every day for a week when writing the paper that wouldn t die i appreciated that he noticed i still prefer independent coffee shops like citadelle or toast but when i m too lazy to go that far this will do plus i m a sucker for that passion iced tea in the summer get it half sweetened it s better and for it s pretty good

this is my favorite starbucks ever thanks to the barista her name starts with a c i believe who made my drink a double shot on ice perfectly and without a second thought or even an eye roll she seemed happy to be there the manager at the counter however named jeff was absolutely rude to me he acted visibly annoyed with me while taking my order and had a mocking tone to his voice i could tell he didn t want to deal with me i was polite as can be but he definitely woke up on the wrong side of the bed seems to me like the barista and manager should switch positions she is much more customer friendly than he is and served me with sweet hospitality and a warm smile she is the only reason i will return

your typical starbucks a good stop on a nice day while shopping in beautiful suburban square there is plenty of outdoor seating available to enjoy the sun while you self medicate your caffeine addiction
free wifi free power for devices over priced drinks exactly what you would expect

oh how i love this starbucks mainly because of where it s located today was my first time to this location it s been long overdue for starbucks in the neighborhood it s very clean nice decor plenty of seats inside and out overall a nice space to enjoy the riverfront the employees were welcoming and friendly they seemed very knowledgeable of the drinks however they were very busy lines were long and the service was slow i ordered the usual grande carmel macchiato it did not taste as if it was made properly i told the barista it tasted funny and they gladly made it again this time it tasted a bit better lol although i did not have the best service today i will go back to give them a second chance if you live in the area definitely give them a try im sure they ll get better with time

i love starbucks and this is two miles from my home but the parking has become impossible last two times i ve been no parking drove across the street to an independent equally good coffee shop i want to be a loyal customer but this location is making it hard don t do business coffee here anymore either no quiet tables for two the staff here is great the space is clean but it needs a bigger space and parking lot

not my favorite venue but was in a hurry and needed a caffeine fix starbucks starbucks i never see any differences except location service even the staff seems the same expensive but good coffee what s a girl to do caffeine fixes can reach critical levels

standard issue starbucks coffee tasted about the same as most of the other starbucks i ve been to the seating area inside and outside is relatively large no drive thru prices were about the same and the friendliness factor at starbucks is generally bordering weird as it is
decent latte great quick drive thru what else can you say
not a lot of seating but they get my orders out in a timely manner service is good and it is clean
great drinks like any starbucks and great customer service but the bugs flying around are so annoying i can t study do work in the store i have to sit outside because the gnats flies are so present

a convenient star for this part of the world with access from both street road and second street pike its proximity to some of my favorite restaurants aroi thai blue sage and house of pho make it a perfect quick apr s dinner stop for hot brew on the way to the movies or home it is not the most attractive franchise unit in the area but it serves a functional purpose unlike a box of chocolates you always know what you are going to get
it s as good as any starbucks mediocre at best

it s my local starbucks the staff is always very friendly and has more to say than what do you want has a drive through if it wasnt out of my way i d visit more often man i wish there was another one closer to my house can we get a starbucks at the beach
extremely long wait but grateful for the drive thru staff are pleasant got my drinks right

good overall coffee service notes the main entrance is the same for both the bank right starbucks left my flat white was good but not great and my one wish would be that they add a clover brewing system

i rate this starbucks stars instead of because as another reviewer stated this starbucks tends to be consistently busy and loud on the inside i would not recommend having a meeting interview or phone call here the drive thru is very busy as well and is one of the slower drive thrus i have used at a starbucks the staff is below average and there seems to be a fair amount of attrition i have received more wrong orders here than at other starbucks it is clean on the inside and has nice outdoor seating the large windows to the south make the afternoon sunshine coming in nice

small location inside a rest area but with a full menu the milk and sweeteners are done by the baristas not at a station so make sure to ask for what you need service was slower than at dedicated locations but still fairly friendly not bad for a quick pick me up on the road

incredibly busy constantly i came here a few times during a trip to tulane and visited during the week and on a weekend and it seemed like there was always a line out the door i think because of this the service wasn t the friendliest but i can understand given the sheer volume of orders the outside patio is really nice and would be a great place to work or study i just wish there would have been space the few times i was there

dan is the man at this drive thru actually most of the staff that service the window are friendly personable attentive accurate and prompt but dan adds entertainment to the list good coffee and other drinks not liking the new items offered through la boulange or however you spell it most of the pastries need to be heated to taste good as they are refrigerated or stale tasting otherwise on the plus side they seem to have more offerings than in the past as far as pastry variety quality of food is no where near panera but tops on beverages you will encounter long lines at windows on rush hour parking lot is tough and not driver friendly use caution

starbucks on the washu danforth campus bauer hall the business school this means a few things changing hours based on the school calendar when school is not in session it may be closed or open for a short amount of time unpredictable hours if the school has a special event it may be closed lack of seating space during peak hours like lunch time though there are a lot of tables it shares the space with the b school cafe which has a lot of undergraduate and graduate students there all the time you can use the app to pay but can t redeem rewards or order ahead of time for pickup wonderful staff
this starbucks is cramped every time i have been in there the coffee doesn t taste as fresh as other starbucks the staff is friendly but it s certainly not a first choice for me

i guess it was ok i am just use to the staff at my usual sb s remembering me spoiled yes the staff was nice and the coffee exceptional i paid with my iphone app that s always fun i will go back to my usual starbucks from now on

oh man did these guys get a new staff things seem to be served so much slower than in the past i live across the street so it s super convenient and i wouldn t stop coming back but man i have to give myself like extra minutes additional now compared with the old staff

spacious clean starbucks located next to st joe s baristas were friendly but a little inefficient people in line and minutes to get my drink hate to see what would happen if the line really started to back up not sure how long this store has been around but it seems pretty new strange hours as it closed at on the day that i visited let s not stay open too late now we might pull in too many college kids in need of a study break
solid stars it was pretty clean to be so populated and they served regular starbucks and did not try to rip me off unlike the starbucks on south broad street

this starbucks in horsham is staffed by friendly baristas who aim to please and you do not get too much of the upsell dont you want something to eat today schtick the drive through window is convenient but it is a pain to get in and outof the parking lot due to the traffic nothing special but nothing wrong with this location

i love starbucks coffee and not all the stores are the same this location is nice because it does have a drive thru window if you just want to get it on the run inside is pretty clean and kept up not very big but there are outdoor tables if you want to sit outside i always ask for my drink extra hot and for some reason this location never has been able to do that for me the parking lot is not very big and is usually crowded since they do share it with other businesses i usually park in the raleys lot and walk over

since i came twice this week i ll write about both experiences earlier i ordered via drive thru the lines are usually long at this location today was lite in comparison even with a lite line their drive thru service can be a bit slow but that could be perspective since we expect things almost instantly in a drive thru line i ordered my iced doppio as usual and it was made perfectly with all of my little additions if you order banana nut loaf ask them to warm it up it will change your world today i ordered an iced doppio and it didn t turn out as expected so they actually have on the menu an iced doppio that comes grande and i think there are things added in it that i m not too fond of so if you want a double espresso just ask for a double espresso i ll have to remember that next time other than that my bacon gouda egg sandwich was great the only negative experience this trip was coming inside the store this time and with only people in front of me it still took while before i was able to order guess i ll have to use the app more to order from this store specifically

not bad not superb just starbucks i love that there s a drive thru but the location is off of the street so it s kind of hard to get here yesterday morning the lid of my frappuccino was not properly applied to the cup so it created a whole mess after i pulled off not cool baristas not cool but i ve been here several times before then and had no problem

this is the fivebucks in the lobby of the big marriott in center city and it gets busy and crowded and messy at the sugar creamer station and attracts a few vagrants who are quickly ushered away from tourist eyes meanwhile i needed a latte and i latte i obtained what a rush try not to come here from am on a weekday mob scene

this is an average starbucks near the entrance to terminal a and the baggage claim area i have been a couple times while waiting on delayed luggage my order has always been correct so no complaints there there are a few nice chairs to lounge in while burning time

its an average starbucks location i think the best quality is the amount of outlets along the glass wall maybe i m spoiled but the staff at the location closer to my house is really friendly the peeps here not so much not that they are rude or anything just not friendly the wifi kicks me out about every minutes which is annoying they ve recently rearranged the seating area to allow for more space but it feels pretty cramped now they do have a large outdoor patio area which i think is awesome weather permitting

i was starving and needed coffee desperately when i stopped by this location it was a cold day outside so needless to say all the indoor seating was taken the barista was very friendly and was quick about getting my coffee started my spinach wrap was a different story it seemed to take awhile and when they said it was ready it was a breakfast sandwich apparently another customer had taken my wrap the barista apologized and started another wrap for me they served it as soon as it was ready which meant it was super hot the taste was good though not my favorite starbucks location but not bad

this location usually has an extremely long line but thanks to being early wait time was relatively short all the folks behind the counter were friendly and energetic but they don t have any breakfast sandwiches
this was a typical starbucks service was prompt staff was pleasant

knowledgeable barristas who don t hesitate to give you good service its what you really are paying for at starbucks not the coffee they are always busy but being so close to the movies and off the highway has that effect
close to the freeway good for travelers good promt service nice drinks like any starbucks mostly close to the freeway

not my favorite usf area starbucks but convenient on my way to work parking is often an issue and many times when i visit the baristas are cleaning or vacuuming or conducting other loud tasks not an ideal location to sit and chat though the seating is plentiful and diverse a couple big comfy chairs a high top a long bar that regulars sit at to chat with the baristas my last visits have been okay one was for a frappuccino that took far too long to make between the baristas working and no one in front of me the guys after me got their drinks before me and they were quite chummy with them meanwhile i m standing there awkwardly waiting the girl doing the register was new and took awhile to ring me up but it was fine last night i wanted a passion tea lemonade and was told they were out of lemonade i was recommended to try a passion tea apple juice and reluctantly agreed then the computer froze up for a minute and i was given it on the house bonus i ll take some free starbucks though i admit i did want the stars on my card lol this one is much less crowded than fowler and not much further from usf i also wish this was drive through or there was some drive through on my way to usf but this one is pretty good fowler is my favorite for the friendliness and speed but this one is good too
this place is easy to get to in center city the staffs are friendly and drinks are well made i was able to get in and out quickly not bad

starbucks is not really something a challenge in terms of food you know what you re going to get customer service however is very important i ve been coming to the egg harbor greentree starbucks for years as a regular i can say that the staff here is extremely friendly and helpful one issue you may have depends on the time of the day at some points high school lets out and this place can be as loud as a school cafeteria other times several parents decided that this starbucks is a good place to bring their children being in washington township they have the my kid does no wrong attitude and often the parents will allow their infants to cry or their younger children to run around as if this were a daycare it does affect the experience of a nice place to relax with a tasty beverage the service gets a star rating the crowd sometimes kills it though
my once a month place while waiting for my wife s meeting to end always busy a bit noisy but if i xan sit in the comfy chair im happy friendly baristas

this review regards this location not the amazing food and drinks this starbucks is a local hangout for high schools like baldwin and shipley i think that everyone agrees that their parking lot is atrocious it is impossible to find parking especially in the morning it is always hard to sit down and some on the seating in the left side of the starbucks is really weird there are two big tables that are simply awkward some of the baristas there is super friendly but it isn t rare that i get a non attentive barista
always good service need plant based food options all locations i have noticed much better snacks

i just love having a bit of heaven in a cup on my way to work in the morning such a treat this location is brightly lit clean and roomy everyone we ve met there has been friendly and helpful the store is gearing up for christmas and have added some pretty nice shiny bits free wi fi nice location and great company while enjoying my hot beverage what more can i ask
this starbucks was ok small cramped and people lounge everywhere so there was no where to sit the staff seemed gossipy and distracted not my favorite one i will stop here on an as needed basis

parking is a challenge because it s so busy outlets to work off of are not easily accessible like at other locations i don t think i ll be back here anytime soon i don t like the layout here havertown is so much better in that regard

i have to comment on the drive thru service folks i continue to have the unfortunate pleasure of being served by ladies who seem to dislike working at starbucks never been to a starbucks where customer service was just disappointing and boring i might as well been served at a dmv many of us enjoy the idea of ordering from starbucks and having us a fancy drink being served by a friendly upbeat employee i continue to be robbed of such experience please switch out the drive thru ladies
very large plenty of study space friendly attentive staff very very very cold staff said they have no control over the heat everyone had their winter coats on i had to leave it was so cold

this is a review for the charbucks next to the wyndham garden inn on route in exton this starbucks is walk able from there and literally saved me throughout the weekend of a conference where i was forced to stay at the wymdham i came here for breakfast got some decent coffee and a breakfast sandwich which beat the heck out of the pre packaged grab go garbage that the hotel was offering i alsostopped in around pm during a break in the conference and got a much needed macchiatto sp thank you fourbucks

i like this starbucks as others have said it s true some of the barista s can be slightly slow moving i ve been here about x s only though so i may not be completely right about that i think i ve ordered frappacinnos only which i always thought were well made there s a parking lot that s a nice thing as street parking is metered off topic there s a ups zesto pizza in this retail fixture i ve been to the pizzeria only once but really liked it got slices nice portion sizes so much took third one home

right on main street in new hope nice outside seating although your view is of the intersection quick service with a smile and the typical starbucks quality no parking at the store since it on main street so don t think you are going to just pull into the parking lot and run in
great customer service on every visit the employees ate always so chipper they make my visit thru the drive thru great

i always go to this starbucks before work and love the drive through option and the sleek look however getting in and out of there is insane gulf to bay is one of the busiest highways without having a light it makes it far more difficult i hope the move works out for them but i will not be going to this one before work anymore

very friendly staff and apologetic seems that in the mornings they are always out of the sandwich i want the biggest issue i have though is the lack of speed i can place a mobile order and minutes later walk in and it s still not ready only once in the last month has it actually been waiting for me i m not sure why it s so slow all the time there always seems to be plenty of staff working regardless the staff is super friendly i just wish things could be faster

smaller starbucks in the olde city section of philly can get cramped when busy seating is at a premium typical food and drinks here service is the usual efficient folks kids that work at these places never any issues parking of course is tough in this area does the job for starbucks fans that live and work in the area and want a drink or bite to go but if you are looking for place to bring your laptop and sip your latte slowly there are better starbucks to be found
typical starbucks nice location and nice enough staff drinks are overpriced so i don t come here often but i love the passion fruit lemonade

recently renovated the pros more modern looking there s more fridge space to offer more non coffee items the baristas are still the same ones pre renovation there s outdoor seating now the cons power outlets eliminated all except for the new furniture seems to be intentionally less comfortable to keep people from hanging out for a long amount of time they still make the beverages in a quality way but sadly it is no longer the coffee shop that s designed to be a place for casual conversation

this is a pretty good sbux long but swiftly moving line accurate order fulfillment ample condiment station plenty of comfy shmumfy leather armchairs footrests and power outlets what more could you ask for maybe a lil of that free sbux wi fi but no its in the usf library and guess what you need a visitor code oh well everything else is great

oh you know your run of the mill starbucks the bathrooms were clean this starbucks seems much larger than other locations there is plenty of seating as well as outdoor seating the staff was friendly but the drinks do take quite a while not sure if i will be back to this starbucks it s in the most convenient location to get in and out
i really wish this starbucks was bigger it s such a nice place to study but it gets so crowded however it does have good working wifi

ok as far as starbucks go would love a little more friendly vibe but haven t seen that from here ever not saying it s unfriendly just blah varied crowd if you want to people watch i mean it is downtown clearwater after all

love starbucks but this location is always busy am and i m th in the carline to order sometimes they bring out a barista to take orders and speed up the process but that is inconsistent in my experience the service is always friendly but the cashiers inside and at the drive through do not seem to have the urgency you d expect for somewhere that gets this much traffic

starbucks is always good i love the oatmeal and passion tango ice tea my boyfriend had a coffee frap he liked very much the only reason i m giving stars to this starbucks is because i looked all over for a recycling bin to recycle my cups etc and it was no where to be found there was a whole story on the wall about how starbucks is trying to be green etc but there was no recycling bin they definitely need a recycling bin and a compost bin then they will get five stars

back to being a starbucks gal i was going to dunkin off missouri the evening service is terrible the moral energy here is consistent my only thing is the amount of espresso they give in a single shot is extremely minute not even a full shot but i d rather come here where the service is great

no drive thru small location mediocre staff they seem less friendly than other stores not because they are snobby they re just clueless i guess starbucks is becoming the job of this decade as compared to mcdonalds of the s lol it s not exactly a happy store not the starbucks culture

i enjoy starbucks and this location it s right in the middle of town and you can sit outside and enjoy your coffee and the weather my only complaint is the long wait and it s a bit dirty the tables and chairs always have some kind of spill marks and crumbs and the bathrooms are just filthy i m sure if they fixed those things up it would be much more appealing getting my grande white chocolate mocha now

it s a starbux so its the usual good quality coffee consistent i m here in the evening it s not crowded but steadily busy no waiting had a cranberry bliss bar that didn t seem to be quite as good i remembered not sure if it s my memory or it just wasn t as good but hey i like starbux this one is as good as others but no special hi how are ya s

the remodel is awful sterile and not friendly or inviting for hanging out most likely this is by design by someone to drive more traffic through and discourage long stays coffee is still good but the food is pre packaged and meh at best so for over all id rate sb my fav for coffee but they ruined a good thing with the remodel
i love my coffee but they were really sloooooooow i miss the old staff they had

this starbucks is in a cute little part of webster groves next to gazebo park where events and farmers markets are held in summer it s just like any other starbucks but this is right next to my work so i go there all the time usually around pm when i hit the afternoon slump the staff are friendly and always prompt with my order and they rarely mess it up my go to drinks are the white chocolate mocha with non fat milk and no whipped cream as well as the java chip frappacino skinny and without whipped cream the clientele at this location are a mixture of business people hippies young teens nerinx hall an all girls high school is just around the corner university students webster university is within walking distance artists entrepreneurs and stay at home moms you really get a mixed bag here i typically don t sit and stay to drink my lattes but when i have in the past the furniture is comfy with a variety of seating choices for individuals or small groups and the place is kept clean and orderly it doesn t wow my pants off but it maintains the high standard of starbucks that i expect a solid standby

good experience maybe it s me i just don t get the hype of starbucks at all i had a gift card for starbucks i thought it had and change turns out it was eight two cents my husband ordered the white mocha drink and enjoyed it i got the sweet cream cold brew very good my daughter has educated me on many things starbucks lol so relieved to see gender neutral bathrooms insert sarcasm here apparently this is a big deal in the yelp check in world the starbucks is comfy and relaxing and we sat in the cozy leather chairs i don t know i always feel so out of place in these kinds of coffee places i m usually super basic black coffee no cream no sugar can i be any more boring i think back to an episode of curb your enthusiasm when larry david went to a place like this and has no idea about the menu his order was just give me a vanilla bullshit drink that s what i ve always got in my mind when i go to these kind of snobby coffee bars lol
hello it s starbucks what else do you need to know this one does have more space than the average and a nice outdoor seating patio otherwise order your normal caramel nowhip crapuccino and enjoy

i wanted to start by saying the hours here on yelp are not correct i m not certain what the hours are but i came through passed by multiple times between am on my way into work and it wasn t open i was able to get breakfast here one morning but that was after am the line moved very quickly but their menu is severely limited i had to settle on my rd breakfast option because they were out of the other i got the feta wrap but it was still frozen cold in the middle which sucked the good thing is my iced chai latte was very good but took awhile to get made would be open to return next time i m in town

it s starbucks so i can t say much i enjoy a latte now and again but of course it s pricey this particular location can get really congested staff is okay they don t quite have the friendliness of most starbucks baristas i ve encountered i wouldn t recommend coming during peak times or if you re in a hurry

it s totally a starbucks it s starbucks y with accents of starbucks in a starbucks theme and obvious starbucks influences i wish they had more comfy chairs not super tall tables but that s nitpicking it exactly lives up to expectations you didn t need a review to know what it was like you re going anyway

this sbux is sickkkkkkk why i love this sbux the crowd its filled with whites and asians thats right i said it b tches its clean most likely due to crowd outside patio is big workers arent afraid to say hi or be friendly shitter was clean hmmm i cant think of more parking can be challenging and i saw a cpl bums when i was there bums dont bother me too much until they are near and start talking as for the products its starrbucks korean words sul tang sugar coppee coffee cha tea yuja girl

stars mostly only for shock value let me preface this by saying that i am not a fan of starbucks i think their coffee is over caffeinated and often burnt their espresso drinks lame at best and everything over priced in fact when i am trying to decide on a cafe to go to starbucks doesn t even make it to the list of options however i must admit that starbucks is extremely convenient they are everywhere and they are open late so when i needed to find a place to study late tonight i decided to go to the green hills starbucks for the first time in maybe years so i walked in tonight with my friend and i couldn t stop my jaw from dropping over and over again and the exclamation wow from coming out of my mouth why because the place has gotten an extreme makeover it s probably to do with the whole new starbucks branding marketing goals but anyway all of the furniture has been replaced with wooden counterparts and comfy couches it has an entirely different feel less commercial and more local and authentic the gigantic study table with electrical outlets has been replaced by benches on the wall bar stools and any other kind of seating you can imagine and the outlets are now impossible to find because they have been painted the same exact brown as the wall which led me to create an extremely awkward situation as i walked around the entire border of the room looking for a plug for my dying laptop despite an inspiring renovation of the entire atmosphere of the place obviously the quality of the drinks has not improved astonished by the new look i inquired the barista about when they redid the place to which she replied last year in february embarrassed i chuckled took my drink and slowly walked away clearly i am behind the times anyway great new feel and atmosphere this one is much more social for starbucks even though the drinks haven t changed so if you must resort to going to starbucks this is the one i would recommend
what can i say about starbucks pretty standard pricey coffee drinks uppity staff and lots of hipsters sucking up free wifi all in all this location is pretty standard

nice drive thru which was great when staying in the area on vacation with our dog also looks like this location has nice outdoor seating but we didn t get to use it since we were on the run to see family each time we stopped in here

it works for moms to bring their kids to but it isn t there for any man to do anything but be of service at no self service coffee stations and door codes at the bathrooms make this a rather exclusive to the mom with child kind of setup
located in a strip mall in montecito it s a larger sbx the emplyees are genuinely nicew and the clients are kooky

starbucks are the same for the most part but this starbucks is pretty rough the parking is minimal and you re likely to get trapped by the drive thru line if you do manage to get a parking spot the line is usually cars deep so getting through the drive thru usually takes at least minutes the employees are friendly and professional and the coffee is fine but the parking and drive thru time is abysmal likely because it s the only one nearby

you ll find this location attached to the hilton bayfront hotel they have an entrance off the street and one inside the hotel also they have shorter hours due to the location as well so be sure they are open before coming this way they do not have a drive thru they have the standard food mugs snacks and beverages of all the locations staff was friendly and the store was clean they do not have a scanner for the phone app so the cashier had to manual input the number and i felt bad for him having to do that they has my drink finished before i was done at the register they also had the florida ornament mug which i picked up here as well no bathroom inside odd location off site parking and no drive thru being this place down a bit overall a great service short hours plenty of seating

as cozy good as caffeine gets on this casino floor this starbucks is tucked away in a corner and could get pretty busy the young people who are working there are very personable and do a commendable job of keeping up with the long lines when they form if you are staying at harrah s or visiting and need caffeine this is where you want to go for good coffee as it arguably is the best option you might have

the products are always on point but since this is the only starbucks within miles the lines are always long never any available tables you will definitely want to pre order your stuff if you need it fast we need more locations corporate giddy up
have only been to drive thru great service and there is never a wait here prices are high but that s to be expected given the company very friendly and professional staff i will come back

the new iced teas that they have here are deeeeeelish here i am sipping on a venti mango black tea lemonade as i type this the price is rather reasonable and the tea is not too sweet i am also a fan of the pretzel must get it warmed up for the added bonus i have never been a fan of the pumpkin spice craze but thumbs up to all that support it within walking distance it s nice to have variety

city line ave phila border located near target a few tempting eateries in this short strip okay starbucks with a outdoorsy sitting area parking don t know i was at crown plaza for a conference when i found this place giant busy target parking lot right behind be creative server never even told me my decaff was ready but the pro is the coffee was not too sweet i like when i can drink it as is i hear it is college student central and i like that being surrounded by a bunch of st josephs and pcom smarty pants p

this starbucks is very often super busy i have rarely come when the line is not a mile long so i am so glad starbucks came out with an order ahead option on their app the seating can get a little tight but usually you can get a seat on the weekends all manner of newtownian folk come out and it is hilarious to eavesdrop on their conversations the nice thing is there is a large parking lot in the back so access is easy

one of the better starbucks in my opinion they actually keep their outdoor tables clean the starbucks on hazel dell has disgusting tables and the baristas are cool too for some reason they have begun locking one of their only two doors before dark this is a main door and not on an alley so there is no security reason from the patio to the open door is almost on the other side of the building i don t get it it s folks make it convenient for your customers

i love starbucks but this location has the most inconsistent output in terms of taste i don t know if it s just because they are always so busy or what but i have standard drinks i rotate and they never taste the same nor do they taste quite right they do have very friendly staff but be warned the lines are often long and service slow

so i wanted to change my review from last time i came back here to study but i realized that some of the tables were very wobbly and not in great conditions furthermore the bathrooms both of them were very disgusting as well when i got my pumpkin spice latte there was already a lot of splatter on my cup and the rim looked like someone drank out of it though it is more reasonable to believe that the latte had overflowed and left its mark however i highly recommend the pumpkin spice latte very sweet and warm service was okay

writing a review on starbucks in general seems a bit useless we all know it and have our own opinions of it this location specifically stands out because it has transformed a landmark building from a useless eyesore into a gorgeous functioning gem a gem which provides tasty caffeine i am sad to say that my first experience here was not a good one i got a ham egg and cheese breakfast sandwich the sandwich was still frozen on the inside i realize they don t have a kitchen there but it was an unwelcome reminder that its basically the same thing as a microwave breakfast sandwich from the grocery store ew i ll still go there for my caffeine fix a lot
it s the closest starbuck s to my office so i keep going back they don t have the quickest service at this location the staff is either very friendly or just kind of bla

love that this starbucks is close to my house they are always friendly my only issue is they have wall outlets in the entire store of those is hidden behind the condiments bar leaving virtually no outlets for the entire seating area other than the comfy chairs not cool it s as if they don t want people hanging out or working from there i probably won t come back here to chill or work sad cause it s an easy fix to run a strip of outlets down the wall please fix

it was kind of a surprise to eye a starbucks in a shopping complex just off one of the seedier strips in the city but a very welcome one as my need for a warm wake up drink was high after hours of sifting through dusty thrift shop merchandise i ordered a cappuccino which was the usual tasty treat and a fruit and nut bar something starbucks has been carrying recently as a healthier option they re basically a granola bar lightly sweet and what really makes these stand out is the addition of dried apricots and cherries yum maybe it was just the time of day or the fact that coffee shops in this area are few and far between but this starbucks appears to get quite a bit of business

customer service is still great nice employees and my order is always good and correct i m updating this review because the drive through wait is horribly long and has gotten worse over the years i typically can t stop here in the morning because the wait is guaranteed to take ten to fifteen minutes if they work on speed this review will go up

my experience is that they have always been friendly usually crowded which makes it rough to get drinks in a timely fashion i do find it crowded in the store but again that comes with the territory of being in a coffee shop setting it definitely is nice and comfy if that is the type of setting you want there is outdoor seating but with fl you can only use that every so often when it is not super hot not raining and not filled with some type of bug flying around overall this place is really good they make good coffee and other beverages and the staff is nice
starbucks is great we know and expect that this one is super friendly downside new seating arrangements are crappy cafe tables not cozy at all anymore
place is always really busy but everyone there is really nice one guy i think his name is grant is super super fun to talk to store manager is super sweet overall everyone is really nice just slow

i ordered a traveler for a meeting a traveler is a cardboard box full of delicious whatever you want i get the blonde roast cause that s what those brainy people like i ve worked here at the tgh for years and love that there is a place like this here it s a safe haven for employees and patient family alike stepping into another world for a break from life i called at night to order my traveler it wasn t ordered in the morning so i was late to my meeting made me look bad but i still love this place

pumpkin spice season i love starbucks and when i relocated to south jersey i knew it was probable that one would not be as close as i had out in san diego a drive thru one blocks away well the closest one is about miles and so when i m in the area and feel like treating myself i stop in this location is usually busy but there is ample parking and the baristas are usually quick getting the orders out i think that the service kind of depends with who you get and if theyre having a good day or not i have had the friendliest service to at times indifference and even a little snobby so customer service is inconsistent which is disheartening because like i said i am a fan of starbucks this location does have a decent offering of baked goods and food items as well and the usual starbucks swag available for purchase

the baristas here are outstanding they re friendly and make grabbing coffee here very pleasant and yet the parking is so atrociously awful i often drive to this location see that there is no parking and then head somewhere else for coffee there is no place to wait for a spot and i ve even been double parked into a spot before it s just a disaster
just fyi for people who like to work and study in coffee shops this one only has one table with an outlet nearby which sucks it s a really nice clean environment otherwise
i just a iced carmel coffee delicious refreshing made perfect starbucks is the best

definitely not my favorite starbucks but the location in conshy right next to the giant is fairly convenient don t expect to lounge around here it s tight and there s not much room for studying or doing work in the afternoon tables may be empty but aren t always clean still service is generally friendly and fast
this is not my favorite spot but it serves its purpose the crew are fast friendly and efficient i do not hesitate stopping here again it can be hairy getting in and out at busier times of the day

minus star for not giving me a paper protector for my cup seriously you hand me a cup in the drive thru over my head with no thingy not sure if it s an idaho thing to save the environment but really drive thru wasn t bad staff was friendly drink was as expected and it is around the corner from the gym i go to in the morning i ll be here more often

cute cozy starbucks i m only giving it three stars because of the music no one comes to a cafe to listen to every song taylor swift ever wrote people come to cafes to write read study think or talk the lyrics to you belong with me breathe red i knew you were trouble bad blood etc are not conducive to these activities some cafes play song selections that are i wish this location was one of them

it was decent that s about all they seemed to not know how to make an oatmeal or open a new carton of coconut milk my dying son found nothing on the menu appetizing and soon after leaving had to throw up was it the service that made him nauseous the food the terminal disease that s eating away at his organs no one can be sure one thing i can be sure of though is that i ll be visiting this starbucks again because the other option is mcdonald s coffee and that s doodoo pure doo doo
standard starbucks clean free wifi friendly staff

this starbucks brings me back to the old school days me and hubby used to come to this location all the time our all time favorite is the white chocolate mocha we used to sip on that and chat upstairs at their lounge section very often this is probably my favorite starbucks since it brung me so much memories since is my favorite why stars i ve been checking in quite a bit lately their drinks are either hit or miss for example i ve been getting the matcha green tea latte sometimes the drink is just right but other times the barista probably didn t shake it enough resulting in chunks of powder at the bottom of the cup sometimes the whipped cream looks so nice while others cheap stingy looking
the atmosphere is nice but the staff was not helpful and did not take my name they appeared new or understaffed as they did not know what i asked for not what i expect out of starbucks
i love starbucks yes i do what i don t love is that i cannot as of yet redeem my starbucks rewards on my smart phone app inside a starbucks target

i love starbucks and this is definitely one of the nicer ones i have been to in my travels but the one thing i can say is that no matter how busy they are it always takes longer for me to get my drink here than at any other starbucks i m just not sure why maybe it s just the mood i m in today haha staff is super nice though
stars because the counter people are nice because they have no drive thru because they have no food
service was great as always my fav ginger josh wasn t there though nothing like a true north first thing in the morning

i have been to this starbucks on several occasions and have not had very good customer service maybe it is because i am going thru the drive thru i always feels like i am annoying them or they are doing me some huge favor my drink was consistent with other starbucks and service was done in a timely manner

this is a standard starbucks location i got a beverage here and got the exact experience that i expected from my visit especially as i ordered on the app i don t really have much else to say about this location as i ve only visited it once or twice ever
we always forget about this starbucks when we are working in town but happened to be able to stop here to use the wifi for work and enjoy a cup of brew wasn t busy at all which we liked

this is a great starbucks location right off of i it is open hours and has a quick drive thru you can t miss the location as there is a giant starbucks sign viewable as you approach the exit i have had no problems here with the quality of the coffee or speed of service as both have been great my only complaint would be with the friendliness of the staff serving the drinks some cheerfulness and politeness goes a long way the last time i came in it seemed more like they didn t really even want to be there

i feel like this starbucks should not have a drive thru it s pretty awkward the way it is set up and people sometimes cannot back out of parking spaces the line gets very long and out into central ave many mornings everyone who works here is very friendly however service is at times inconsistent this is my neighborhood starbucks i visit every other day i think it would be much better if it were set up similar to the th street and th ave location

i ve only been in here once but the baristas are super friendly and chatty i really appreciate it because a lot of people in the university area seem to hate the students it closes late at midnight and it s got two floors i love starbucks you always know what you re going to get

they be slow even for regular coffee they put their priorities on the drive through rather than the people who take the time to come inside which i think is pretty fucked up the place is clean tho which is nice

adequate describes this location perfectly the barista said they were unable to accept starbucks rewards because they are affiliated with the hyatt hotel and not starbucks i m not sure why they can scan my starbucks card for payment but not scan for rewards service was quick and lots of seating areas but tables and chairs were filled with crumbs and a bit challenging to find a clean spot only came here because we needed a cool drink after wandering around the arch park

this starbucks is always busy and packed but mostly because it s the size of a large closet there are only three tables in the whole joint and i m sure that s on purpose with the number of people shuffling in and out it s tough to be productive fortunately they have more tables outside so if the weather is nice you can enjoy some great sites of indianapolis downtown circle

the coffee is good here and the car line typically moves efficiently if you re in the mood for a good convenient coffee this starbucks works well i haven t been inside so i can t vouch for the interior service or setting

nice cool spot always never know what type of entertainment you might get in there with it being downtown on meridian only thing i ordered what i usually order at other locations and it tasted slightly different white chocolate mocha latte not sure what was up with that

one of the best things that this starbucks has going for it is its drive through and friendly service it s fast and efficient depending on how crowded it gets the line can get ridiculous because of how the traffic can flow into the strip mall that this starbucks is located in which can be a pain to get into if you happen to be on the opposite side of the street and trying to cross traffic if you chose to go inside parking can be tight especially during the the morning if there is no parking in front you can park behind the store itself and walk a little the inside has a few tables to sit but space is at a premium especially when crowded the line for orders can sometime merge together when the weather is nice there is a small patio with a few tables and chairs that allow you to watch pendleton pike traffic while enjoying your caffeine

this starbucks has an awful high turnover rate and training new people tends to slow down the delivery of orders there was once upon a time when this location had a steady crew with the two kims working here they were very friendly consistent in their barista skills and super accommodating when they failed us which was very rare now it s a sure hit or miss and i have to pray to the sweet baby jesus above that these baristas get it right so far it s been pretty good but unlike today they had no product for my pink refresher and the new store in algiers had no splenda i opted for the violet refresher in lieu of pink lol and it doesn t taste bad at all needless to say this is my neighborhood starbucks and we ve forged a good friendship with sandy who s been there a while and i look forward to her making our drinks

i was originally going to keep this short sweet you know an espresso with lumps of sugar and stars then i got to thinking about starbucks they were the originators of the chain specialty coffee shops they have grown by leaps and bounds and managed to make money they are a fortune company that has stayed independent with out being franchised new opportunities are available for having a starbucks inside a business hotel or hospital i think starbucks is grossly overpriced why do i say that if i order an espresso in a fine dining restaurant i pay that and more i am unusual in the fact that i love coffee good strong colombian coffee period i make that at home so i do not see the sense in buying it out i also have an espresso machine i am not into lattes or cappuccino s they have a new line of hot chocolates that are sure to be a hit i have had the opportunity to try many of their sandwiches which come into the starbucks already made the ones i have had are very good i also love their breads the multi grain berry bread with egg salad is exceptional their muffins are wonderful but they re still overpriced
place is cute but there s a rude older woman that works here everyone else seemed nice though

i m a starbucks fanatic and i like to share the love around to all the different locations meaning i need one around everywhere i go or i m lost and sad lol well i happened to be heading to help out at a stray rescue adoption event in fenton and swung by this starbucks to grab a venti pumpkin cream cold brew amazing thing first thing i noticed was that these weren t happy people the staff was unsmiling and there were so many behind the counter that they were tripping over each other of course the lady in front of me in line was being a not nice person so i m sure that didn t help she wasn t nice when she came back in because her order was wrong either karma or was it lol the manager i m pretty certain she was the manager made a comment about it loud enough for everyone to hear which was very unprofessional in my opinion my drink which took forever was delicious my experience not so much

from am to pm this is the best starbucks in all of reno the coffee is hot the service is fast and pleasent and the drinks are made correct any time after pm the service go hell in a hand bag i have stopped by for a cup of coffee and they have no fresh coffee they have to brew it give me a break what coffee place at pm doesn t have coffee this place

this location is quite hit and miss i don t recommend the drive thru here plus it s an inconvenient parking lot if you re trying to grab a quick cup of joe that being said if you re meeting a friend for a leisurely coffee date this location might be the right one for you slower paced and not very busy
service use to be stars been times recently they re always out of the protein boxes and chicken sausage breakfast wraps i have yet to find they keep these items stocked the summit starbucks is stars

i like to refer to this location as a manhattan style starbucks because it s size and general atmosphere remind me of multiple locations found on the upper west side today there wasn t much seating available as this location is on a university campus and there were a number of students and faculty lingering with their drinks while focusing diligently on various papers books and laptop screens even so i was able to walk right up to the register and order a hot chocolate surprisingly in a good way my drink was not blisteringly hot rather it was at a temperature that allowed me to enjoy a hot drink on a cold day as soon as i had it in my hand

this is just like any other starbucks you ve ever been to minus comfortable seating the place is always busy and the staff is pretty efficient but very business oriented even rethink is focused on speed and less on hospitality the coffee is starbucks so nothing fancy it s the same fare you can get at any location anywhere the work areas are clean but the merchandise is covered in a layer of dust just goes to show that i m not the only one who thinks a oz tumbler should cost less than but it s a moot point because i wanted a better cup of coffee but i had to very much settle for starbucks

first impression was that it is has a unique layout and it a pretty good size for a downtown location there was plenty of seating and we were able to get a table right away impacts on the experience were the spotty wifi poor acoustics the ambient noise was more overbearing than in most locations conversation really travels here and lastly though it is a matter of opinion it was pretty cold as well

starbucks comes with all the standard setbacks chain restaurant average coffee and questionable service this location adds difficult parking and supersaturated drive thru as additional headaches with that said it is close to home and the staff is comprised of interesting folks that are friendly and conversational you may not find this to be true on your first visit but the place grows on you
starbucks products are great this store doesn t have the friendly service like most i will come here again if i need coffee and am in the area but it s nothing special

as a general rule i try not to write reviews for chains but i make exceptions on occasion this store seems to be investing in the community and is trying to find a balance of being a drive thru and a destination it s definitely an anchor for irvington overall it s a pretty comfortable place to chill and enjoy free wi fi the demands of being a drive thru store makes it so the baristas are not as friendly as i ve seen in other stores i wish lazy daze or another indy coffee store would get it s together to be a real competitor to sbux in the area but from what i ve seen that s not the case at this time coffee standard starbucks food yes vibe standard starbucks wifi yes free plugs yes

another starbucks typical drinks typical snacks typical decoration so what makes this one different from the rest i can point out pros and con pro location this is located on a busy corner of one of the busiest foot traffic streets in edmonton whyte ave also known as nd ave so the location makes this starbucks a great place to meet up with friends while enjoying an afternoon out and about another great aspect about the location is the ability to people watch whether you sit inside or at a table on the sidewalk this is a great location to soak in your surroundings pro i like the bar space set up inside this is something i haven t seen at any other starbucks just to the left of the barista brewing centre there is a bar with about stools set up it is fun to watch the barista s work behind the counter and i love the space available the round tables at typical starbucks are quite small if you are going there to do work but this particular bar is very wide which is ideal to spread out books and papers con i guess this is related to the first pro the fact that it is located on a busy street means lots of street noise from vehicles driving by and also can make it difficult to find parking hopefully this encourages people to take public transit but i know that option is not always feasible overall i do really like this starbucks especially in the summer while the city is abuzz with all of the festivals taking place

obviously this has all the same offerings as a regular starbucks but because it s in a penn building there are some pros cons pros lots of seats and study space nice outdoor seating options dining dollars from penn meal plans can be used convenient campus location cons not allowed to use mobile app for payment they don t accept any starbucks deals or coupons however they do participate in some campaigns such as frapp happy hour few outlets for laptops despite large study space gets busy full during school year staff can be rude sassy atypical of starbucks you can t even get a glass of water
this is a pretty decent place to come to and do homework free wi fi can t complain

let s face it it s starbucks a little bit on the overrated side compared to the hip coffee shops that are now dotting the reno area i don t hate their coffee but it s not my favorite however it always seems to be a good choice for meeting up easy to get to lots of parking and plenty of tables and chairs to pass the time idly by no i am not a regular so they don t know me here and the cashier barrista made that very clear by depriving me of any semblance of a smile that the others have written about here but i have to say when i asked if i could have my cappuccino in one of the real cups and not in one of their famous to go cups he indulged me for that i was grateful my friend had one of their italian sodas and when i asked her how it was her reply eh but we had a good chat so all in all it was not a complete fail

cute little location near terrytown gretna looks like a log cabin somewhat i stopped here a few times during a recent business trip to pick up my fix note the small parking lot tight drive thru you can only turn right leaving

this starbucks is located in a big gateway shopping center and is my go to after i hit up saladworks or the deli or the taco joint at lunch time in the morning it s swamped but at lunch i can usually get my four bucks try almost for a grande iced macchiato caffeine fix le sigh
i usually don t like starbucks but this one has fat friendly service and a big outdoor patio with comfortable furniture

standard starbucks but in a great building the flying saucer building stars is a stretch considering after months of nearly daily visits at the same time they still can not remember my name or drink guess i am asking too much

enjoying a sbux iced reserve blend dragon i believe super dark plenty robust apparently this new line is only available at certain locations i work in wayne pa and they informed me there was none in that area that carried the reserve line tastes like real coffee

my friend ordered a flat white and it was ok not as well prepared as she s had at other starbucks i had a breakfast sandwich and friend tried it as well and lets say it mostly went in the trash to sum things up the experience at this starbucks could have been better if we were greeted with a smile and some enthusiasm however young lady at counter couldn t do either as much as we were trying to be infectious with ours great customer service can a lot of times compensate for mistakes hope this helps improve things at this location

this starbucks location is located in next to the national constitution center which is a plus no free easy parking in the area so this spot is great for walking traffic the staff was nice they did not have cookies available so my son was disappointed i ll definitely be back

i could never give any more stars to a starbucks their coffee is good and all but i hate the rude hipsters and snobs who flock and take over this particular one has a back entrance away from the beards finger banging their crapple laptops so you can order and then bolt edit karen is hands down the best employee there and deserves a raise everyone else gives sub par service and drinks

a starbucks is a starbucks is a starbucks there s a reason these places are so popular and it s not because they each exhibit a sense of individuality walk into a starbucks on the south side like this one and your experience will most likely be the same as walking into one on the west end or north side i rather like the feeling when i m going for coffee i want to be able to relax in a comfortable familiar setting i m also currently addicted to these places since they brought back the holiday special beverages yum unfortunately this one isn t all that great for people watching as it s right in the middle of a shopping mall parking lot ah well can t win them all
me hi can i have a rice crispy treat barista do you mean a marshmallow dream bar me bitch don t play games with me typical average iiiight just like every other starbucks in the world

updated review only three stars today as the pastry display case was pitiful to say the least the barista explained to me that they are having great difficulty getting their pastry orders especially the pumpkin scone order the starbucks advertising for the season talks up pumpkin pumpkin pumpkin and yet they have nothing in their stores someone has obviously dropped the ball major big time on this one nice sb s clean with friendly baristas ample parking out front only drawback is it has no drive thru conveniently located in shopping center with a grocery store

it s a starbucks in a really neat building i love how starbucks has re claimed this space and made it usable again the major downsides are that it s very busy and the drive through is incredibly slow major upside is that this building is a two fer and you can get chipotle next door
a very crowded starbucks the staff was extremely nice but unfortunately did not have my go to chai tea

located on a corner so it is easy in and out on a busy street i opted for the drive thru as i drive a huge truck and the parking lot spaces are on the smaller side the drive thru was a squeeze too but i made it without any mishaps ordered my cold brew and they had it ready by the time i made it to the window staff was decent and prices were normal for the bucks
very long line service was friendly though had to partake in a mocha frappuccino they re really good stuff

what can i say it s starbucks they do have some of the more friendly starbucks employees i ve encountered at this location i think because of its proximity to and carmel there is always a line at the drive thru you will get much faster service and be much less irritated just parking and going inside for your coffee trust me you don t want to be stuck behind the carmel soccer mom ordering her venti pump caramel pump white mocha scoops vanilla bean powder extra ice frappuchino with shots poured over the top apagotto style with caramel drizzle under and on top of the whipped cream double cupped

after spin class nine of us went to starbuck s first ever evening hours wine night the weather was perfect we enjoyed sitting outside everyone ordered wine the service was a little slow maybe because this was the first day to serve wine the staff was friendly and helpful a pleasant lady brought our drinks to us and asked if we needed anything else later she came back and cleared our dirty dishes the wine is served in glasses nice and much to our surprise a snack of seasoned pumpkin seeds was included everyone seemed pleased about that the wine was a good quality mine was delicious i heard several comments about how good it was however everyone seemed to agree that the pour was extremely small and for the price seemed a little chintzy starbuck s please reconsider the pour size and make it comparable to the wine quality and the price do that and i will come back with a five star rating we were all excited to know you are now having wine night

this place was packed in the early morning everyone getting their coffee and danish fix i actually came by twice once in the morning once in the afternoon before our drive back home definitley a slower starbucks compared to others but they make my skinny vanilla latte perfectly only con is you can t reload your starbucks card app or use a free bday drink at this location

let s face it we all kind what starbucks is about you have so many choices and sizes at a premium price i am fine with that their customer service is heralded as top notch i have found the cool refreshers to be a great option to coffee or tea the issue lately with the starbucks locations i have visited is that they do not fill the cup it seems trivial but when you pay top dollar you want your beverage filled not an inch or so from the top next time i will complain but it was just too busy bitching in front of others and backing up the line was not what i wanted let s hope they browse yelp reviews and get it right

quick access good drinks a few indoor seats and consistently good drinks i like this location for it s convenience because in the mornings it s a little slower than the location down the street while it doesn t have a large indoor area to sit down it does have a few seats where there are a couple of regulars that offer a kind a greeting if you feel like chatting it is never a challenge to find someone to talk with usually i need to get some grad school work done or catch up on yelp reviews and i hide out behind my computer the seating outside the store is plentiful the baristas are always helpful and it seems that they could use a couple of extra hands but they are good at what they do and always kind

bluf i only go to starbucks in a pinch because of morals support your local coffee shops i am not a college age white girl i dont wear yoga pants and i hate furry boots but i was drawn to see what the spiced pumpkin latte was all about i made my gf order it for me though to save me the embarrassment it was okay but nothing special not sure what all the hoopla is about my gf got the salted caramel latte which i didnt think was good at all i like just plain black coffee and any time i stray from that i remember why this line is always long but they are efficient and it goes quick they spelled my name right john so that was a little disappointing

i ve frequented this spot in the last few months because i ve been working at a near by office the thing i like about this store is that it has a drive through that typically moves at a decent pace the bummer is that i order the same thing every day and it is never made the same in addition i get charged differently for the exact same order if i don t mobile order it pretty much a decent spot that does have some outdoor seating

legit north county spot it s in a crappy lot by a strip mall but has a lot of parking really close to the hwy too the inside is very very small the drinks are of normal starbucks quality the location over by dunn and is larger and nicer

now that ikes is gone there are not many places to hang out over coffee nearby but i had to meet someone here once and i m glad i did there s a huge table that can be used for groups i was ready for a discussion on race but i was the only minority in here for the hour i stayed

i ve driven past this starbucks many times and thought it looked like an interesting place i ve never stopped but today i found myself downtown and thought i should stop in and have a look overall i d say it s a pretty nice starbucks but it suffers from one fatal flaw as a work location unless you live nearby and that is the pay parking i didn t spend a lot of time driving around looking for free parking because i don t think it exists in this area an hour it s great if you live or work nearby and have the parking taken care of or are using transit to get here otherwise if you re driving forget it unless have a meeting set up here work for a few hours and it s going to cost you not to mention the inconvenience of having to go plug the meter it s at the bottom of an apartment building so i m sure the residents know this location well busyness there are a lot of apartments around here so i expect this place is pretty busy in the morning i wouldn t mind a starbucks near my house noisiness for being pretty steady it hasn t been too bad for a friday afternoon it s winter now so i don t know what kind of crazy person would order an iced drink to get those blenders going but it is canada ambience this isn t your usual boxy starbucks it clips off the bottom corner of the building so it has an unusual layout the windows seem to line about half of the walls so it s quite bright inside with high ceilings power i didn t really see many outlets at the tables so you may have a problem unless your laptop is miserly with the power free wifi available and works well staff friendly and efficient as usual seating there are seats here with one large table to work at if you re into relaxing in an easy chair there are four of them tucked away in the corner and there s an electrical outlet there perfect place for a power meeting or power nap the rest of the tables are the square type with two chairs each i like them much better than the useless round cafe style tables security it s a nice neighbourhood but if you ve read my other reviews you ll know i m just paranoid about that kind of stuff

starbucks as far as drinks go is well starbucks they re always exactly the same i know what to expect and that s what i get so that s the reason for the solid three stars what baffles me about this location is that i have been going there consistently since i moved to this side of town about three years ago and by consistently i mean at least three times a week every single week they still do not know my name every time i go in they act like its the first time they have ever seen me they re never rude but they re not really that nice and even when they re nice they definitely don t recognize me the qt employees next door recognize me more and they have only been seeing me for about months step it up starbucks please
a starbucks in the brewery district what a surprise pretty good location a spacious bright area with lots of laptop friendly tables

they were nice and gave my sweet little lb baby a puppachino he looked like scaly wag when he got it all over his little pug face they were very polite however dogs are not allowed we had to eat it in the parking lot while walking my sweet little pug friend i couldn t help but notice the amount of cancer sticks thrown behind starbucks landscaping shame on you starbucks employees keep southport beautiful

the employees at this starbucks know their customers really well the drinks are good and the service was friendly this is starbucks really small and narrow so don t plan on going there if you want work done because noise echoes a lot
the staff looked like no one wanted to be there and the seating is not relaxing or very inviting they can make a decent drink no problem but the atmosphere is not what it could be
coffee is awesome of course but what i don t get is why they close so early i don t know if it s an arizona thing but usually in ny you can be in the burbs and the coffee joints are hrs

i tried the new guava passion fruit drink i love guava and it was really good except that there was very little drink the cup was filled to the top with ice so that it was gone in just a few sips i now know to order with light or no ice it was a rip off the way i got it

is it too much to ask that the cashier have some sort of personality and acknowledge the customer in front of her no acknowledgement no hello no attempted add ons and no thank you everyone else working was very nice but first impression is everything and this one sucked
service isn t as efficient at the marsh road location but it works

i disagree with kara this is not the worst starbucks in the area and actually has one of the nicest coffee lounge spaces in town tall lofted ceilings look out to mt rose and the surrounding summit sierra mall it s actually a very scenic location the coffee is like every other starbucks good but not great

definitely not my favorite starbucks to visit although my order was made quickly the customer service was nit great and to be honest i would rather wait longer for my order and have a friendly barista than what happened today very upsetting considering this starbucks is the closest one to where i live

compared to other starbucks this one always has the same issue really dirty gross restrooms i stop here on occasion to work before appointments downtown nothing makes me lose my appetite more for a delicious cup of joe than smelling urine while washing my hands please fix begging you because you have good wifi you are kind of my office starbucks most recent visit was yesterday

i am at this starbucks all the time i work just north of downtown between downtown and germantown this starbucks is the nearest coffee shop i can walk to or a coffee shop inside the farmer s market but i prefer not to do that it s in a hidden little area within the doubletree hotel walk down the diagonal sidewalk thing and you ll find it the lines can get very long a lot of state employees frequent this location in large groups but they re pretty fast most of the time they also do a happy hour between and i think when it s buy one get one free on drinks it s just a starbucks but it s gotten me through many an exhausting day

while this is the closet starbucks to me i can t actually visit them regularly because of the lack of consistency of the drinks and the staff there are def some employees that are friendly and smile and the others just barely acknowledge your existence the frappes are also sometimes good and sometimes completely watered down depending on the barista i shouldn t have to dread seeing certain baristas and hope they make things properly

parking is limited here and they are always short staffed i have been here numerous times were i have been waiting in line forever and ended up leaving with out ordering anything today i went to this location to give it another try and i have to say it was quick getting in and out i ordered a trenta passion tea lemonade and it was perfect apparently they are building a bigger starbucks next to the bank of america in the parking lot so we shall see if the service changes but overall today was a good day to make a purchase at starbucks

what can i say it s a starbucks after all not my first choice for coffee but pleasant to do some work in a comfy oversized chair with soft music in the background i was there for hours and it was crazy busy the entire time coffee was starbucks

great place to take a break not too fond of the outdoor seating since it s right on the corner of the parking lot where cars come and go i stop here on my weekly shopping trips because it s convenient for me still can t get use to the coed bathrooms the servers are sweet and friendly here
can t complain with starbucks just watch leave extra early if u want to go to this location in the mornings during the week because it gets crowded
