this is one of the starbucks that makes you sooooooo glad you can now order from the app the people are normal customer service workers over worked short staffed and under paid in sure as it shows in their work this is not one of the fun hang out happy people starbucks the building is nice the lay out seems backward and causes a lot of congestion and there for some unholy reason is always a line out the door i have never walked out of a star bucks before getting coffee the source of my life but i have here it s just not worth the wait they take forever coffee is coffee but if you go here order from the app it s going to still take a while but it s less than waiting in that line

coffee and service were as expected the location itself is challenging to get in and out of being that it shares a building with a famous fast food restaurant the bathrooms were a bit confusing you have to get a key code from a barista and honestly were rather messy though for the bottom line the coffee was crafted exactly as i d expect and service was friendly so i can not be too harsh i would just reccomend some kind of sign with directions for the bathroom doors and to keep up on them a little better

average starbucks i have been through the drive thru and inside many times parking lot is always full and sometimes i have to park in the neighboring hotels lot the employees are friendly however there are always new people here accuracy of the orders are sacrificed because they are always training new people i am pretty leinient on my scoring because of that i am not reviewing starbucks products on this review because i have done so in others their products taste the same as every other one around
regular starbucks coffee at the airport entrance of terminal b they actually have quite a few choices and get really busy
its a nice starbucks location plenty of inside seating in this small strip mall order is always correct parking is tough so we park in the next strip mall and walk over

i m sure most would consider me somewhat of a coffee snob i blame it on being from the seattle area which is obviously also starbucks home but i am in no way too good for starbucks especially because when it comes for convenience and ease of acquiring said coffee on my way to work nothing is easier than this place usually hoppin with all the people going to work in intech commons etc at least in the morning but the staff are nice and pleasant and they do the best they can in a rush thank you for helping me out when my bod desperately needs to be caffeinated sometimes in the morning also my workplace thanks you for saving my productivity on those days ps if you ever get the bug up your backside to make it a drive thru do it people will love it and it may ease the congestion inside the store in the am

i had never really gave into the hype of starbucks sb it was just one of those places that everyone seemed to enjoy coffee smoffee what s the fuss right wrong i think i may have become a new convert one early morning i needed to feed the post workout beast within ya girl was hungry without trying i had time to spare before work and wanted to try something different sb seeped into my thoughts and i hopped on over to loughborough commons per one of my favorite youtuber s vlogs she constantly raved about the bacon gouda sandwich so i went with that along with the strawberry acai refresher with coconut milk this particular store is small and sits at the corner to the entrance the drive thru was giving the ladies morning rush hell but they still managed to greet me somewhat dully when i walked in the store was clean and airy on the inside after a few secs of menu gazing to make sure my choices were the one i gave the cashier my order quick simple the wait wasn t too long the workers were going as fast and accurate as possible the cashier didn t ask for my name and i m not apart of their rewards program so they had to yell out my order to me ain t no thing as long as it was accurate lol the strawberry refresher was amazing mixed very well and so fresh i ll definitely be ordering that again the sandwich just ok the applewood bacon was very crispy the egg was cooked to my liking but i just wasn t wow d beautiful looking sandwich tho honestly the sausage egg cheese sandwich from bread co is way better imo in addition my total was pricey sb is pricey in general but nothing over the top being a new convert i m willing to try all of what s offered at starbucks hopefully another trip and experience brings about more stars

i like local but it s the only option out here other than pj s pj s is local ish but their coffee isn t to my liking so here i am it s easy to sit here and grab a few moments of zen before my evening class

not my favourite starbucks it s much too busy for me it isn t well lit and the size of it is kind of oddly shaped very long which makes everything squishy staff are nice and i would say that i go here primarily because of the convenience factor why not have a latte to sip as you stroll around southgate at least they make your drinks properly here
coffee and staff are nice but the lines here are abominable plan a minimum mins during the week in the morning
good danish fresh buttery and soft but for a medium iced chai tea latte really and it wasn t even that good ummm half bucks wasted here

starbucks is my go to place to work and kill some time for really one reason free refills on tea and coffee for members this location is the only starbucks in the area but it is definitely not my favorite in tampa they are always crowded never feel like they have enough seats or tables the outdoor area feels like it is sitting in the parking lot and about half the time in the afternoons they seem to be out of something sometimes more than one they are super nice here and the problems aren t enough that i don t come when i m in the area but if i m heading elsewhere i would far rather be at the kennedy starbucks this one meets my caffeine needs but it isn t the most relaxing of locations

this is a typical starbucks there aren t any cushy chairs which is kind of sad and it s very crowded because it s right near a lot of classroom buildings for penn and drexel however the baristas are always very friendly and they try their best to move people through the lines i would recommend going here during off peak hours such as early in the morning or in the evening where you can usually get a seat

starbucks ahhh classic love a good frapp every once in a while it doesnt happen very often because this location always has a wait early morning i have no time for slow pace between traffic and always running behind this location for me would have me in search of a new job parking is impossible at times i mean they are connected to the bank and also a very busy mall always a drive thru line unless some random hour of the day cake pops a guilty overpriced pleasure i adore do not care much for there breakfast only a fan of the coffee i am a dunkin donut kind of gal so this is stars for me

well i don t know where to start one thing this place is always packed this is my first time having starbucks yeah it s true why you ask well probably because i hate the smell of coffee so if it wasn t for a gift card i would have never tried them like i mentioned its always packed so we walked in the service was perfect i ordered a blueberry muffin and a apple juice it came out nice and warm and was damn good i can honestly see why folks are crazy about this place i m just not into all the coffee and lattes it s just not my thing and for the record i almost died from the coffee smell while waiting for the order lol

this place always seems packed probably because it s the only one near university street on campus i ordered my drink ahead on the app and it was not ready at the predicted time all the seats were full so i had to take my drink to go

i like this starbucks location it s very relaxing and they have a good amount of sitting space both inside and outside my drinks are usually mixed very well here also sometimes they re under staffed and get long lines today i had to ask for a refund because i was waiting over minutes and the manager wasn t very friendly about it however overall i enjoy my experiences here and everyone is very friendly they also give great recommendations for new coffee drinkers
stars for coffee sometimes it s very weak and flaw stars for customer service polite friendly baristas
really nice people just wish they could get my order right i am a daily to double daily and my order is only right maybe half the time and it is the same order every time
it is hard to screw up sbux as i call it it s close by and the drive thru is open late which i am happy about so far so good let s hope it stays that way

nice starbucks inside harrah s casino only problem you ve got to walk through a cigarette smoke filled casino to get to it harrah s is an old school dirty smelly old casino to my surprise the starbucks was clean and relatively fresh

out of towner review thank you and you suck are how i feel given that you are in a convention center you d think although it was the weekend you d have better hours of operation conventions run days a week my convention happened to run sunday tuesday so opening day sunday everyone was jonsing for coffee all day but after pm you were screwed it was closed you could endure the gross humidity and or pouring rain and walk a few blocks to the marriott starbucks but theirs closes early too annoyed to say the least but for the two remaining days was their saving grace although the line was continuously people deep these automons kept it movin no lie they were quick and efficient for a very small set up they weren t the friendliest but they were damn good and efficient with their time you can t complain about that if i walk the length of this convention center you better reward me with a caffeinated beverage your wimpy hours just won t cut it for all the various people who saunter through here step up your game but keep up the good work it s a catch sorry guys keepin convention er s caffeinated on their timetable
